name: unarchive_a_public_or_private_channel
description: Unarchives a specified public or private slack channel that is currently archived, using its channel id.

channel_id.description:
The unique identifier of the public or private channel to be unarchived.
Examples:
  "C0123456789"
  "G0987654321"

arguments.description: Request schema for unarchiving a Slack channel.
